userMessage: Write a launch announcement for X and LinkedIn.

toolInput.content:
Just shipped a major update to our app! 🚀

New features include:
• Dark mode support
• Faster load times
• Bug fixes and improvements

Thanks to everyone who provided feedback. You all are amazing! 💪

#ProductUpdate #TechNews #Startup

structuredContent.title: Review Your Post
